MeasurementToolMetadata.Instructions: Please read each of the following items and decide whether it is true as applied to you or flase as applied to you. Please select your answer by selecting the appropriate circle. If the statement is true or mostly true, click on the circle marked TRUE. If the statement is false or mostly false, click on the circle marked FALSE. Answer all items, even if you are unsure of your answer. NOTE: When considering your answer, do not include times when you were under the influence of drugs or alochol. Also do not include times when you were dreaming, just waking, or falling asleep.
MeasurementToolMetadata.Notes: 74 True/False items measuring schizotypal personality features, 52 True/False questions are used for validity testing. Scored on-site into 9 subscales, 3 factors, and validity scales.

spq_q_1.Description: Do you sometimes feel that things you see on the TV or read in the newspaper have a special meaning for you?

spq_q_2.Description: At times I feel like swearing.

spq_q_3.Description: I sometimes avoid going to places where there will be many people because I will get anxious.

spq_q_4.Description: Have you had experiences with the supernatural?

spq_q_5.Description: I think a great many people exaggerate their misfortunes in order to gain the sympathy and help of others.

spq_q_6.Description: Have you often mistaken objects or shadows for people, or noises for voices?

spq_q_7.Description: There have been a number of occasions when people I know have said hello to me.

spq_q_8.Description: Other people see me as slightly eccentric (odd).

spq_q_9.Description: It takes a lot of argument to convince most people of the truth.

spq_q_10.Description: I have little interest in getting to know other people.

spq_q_11.Description: People sometimes find it hard to understand what I am saying.

spq_q_12.Description: People sometimes find me aloof and distant.

spq_q_13.Description: Once in a while I think of things too bad to talk about.

spq_q_14.Description: I am sure I am being talked about behind my back.

spq_q_15.Description: I am aware that people notice me when I go out for a meal or to see a film.

spq_q_16.Description: I have very few quarrels with members of my family.

spq_q_17.Description: I get very nervous when I have to make polite conversation.

spq_q_18.Description: I do not always tell the truth.

spq_q_20.Description: At times I feel like smashing things.

spq_q_21.Description: Have you ever had the sense that some person or force is around you, even though you cannot see anyone?

spq_q_22.Description: People sometimes comment on my unusual mannerisms and habits.

spq_q_23.Description: I do not read every editorial in the newspaper every day.

spq_q_24.Description: I prefer to keep to myself.

spq_q_25.Description: I sometimes jump quickly from one topic to another when speaking.

spq_q_26.Description: I am poor at expressing my true feelings by the way I talk and look.

spq_q_27.Description: Most people will use somewhat unfair means to gain profit or an advantage rather than lose it.

spq_q_28.Description: Do you often feel that other people have got it in for you?

spq_q_29.Description: Do some people drop hints about you or say things with a double meaning?

spq_q_30.Description: Often I can't understand why I have been irritable and grouchy.

spq_q_31.Description: Do you ever get nervous when someone is walking behind you?

spq_q_32.Description: Are you sometimes sure that other people can tell what you are thinking?

spq_q_33.Description: I cannot remember a single occasion where I have ridden on a bus.

spq_q_34.Description: When you look at a person, or yourself in a mirror, have you ever seen the face change right before your eyes?

spq_q_35.Description: Sometimes other people think that I am a little strange.

spq_q_36.Description: At times my thoughts have raced ahead faster than I could speak them.

spq_q_37.Description: I am mostly quiet when with other people.

spq_q_38.Description: I sometimes forget what I am trying to say.

spq_q_39.Description: Criticism or scolding hurts me terribly.

spq_q_41.Description: Do you sometimes get concerned that friends or co-workers are not really loyal or trustworthy?

spq_q_42.Description: Once in a while I put off until tomorrow what I ought to do today.

spq_q_43.Description: Have you ever noticed a common event or object that seemed to be a special sign for you?

spq_q_44.Description: I get anxious when meeting people for the first time.

spq_q_45.Description: I certainly feel useless at times.

spq_q_46.Description: Do you believe in clairvoyancy (psychic forces, fortune telling)?

spq_q_47.Description: I often hear a voice speaking my thoughts aloud.

spq_q_48.Description: Sometimes when I am not feeling well I am irritable.

spq_q_49.Description: Some people think that I am a very bizarre person.

spq_q_50.Description: It makes me impatient to have people ask my advice or otherwise interrupt me when I am working on something important.

spq_q_51.Description: I find it hard to be emotionally close to other people.

spq_q_52.Description: I often ramble on too much when speaking.

spq_q_53.Description: I have never felt better in my life than I do now.

spq_q_54.Description: My 'non-verbal' communication (smiling and nodding during a conversation) is poor.

spq_q_55.Description: I feel I have to be on my guard even with friends.

spq_q_56.Description: I often think, 'I wish I were a child again.'

spq_q_57.Description: Do you sometimes see special meanings in advertisments, shop windows, or in the way things are arranged around you?

spq_q_59.Description: Do you often feel nervous when you are in a group of unfamiliar people?

spq_q_60.Description: What others think of me does not bother me.

spq_q_61.Description: Can other people feel your feelings when they are not there?

spq_q_62.Description: Have you ever seen things invisible to other people?

spq_q_63.Description: I find that I often walk with a limp which is the result of a skydiving accident.

spq_q_64.Description: Do you feel that there is nobody you are really close to outside of your immediate family, or people you can confide in or talk to about personal problems?

spq_q_65.Description: It makes me uncomfortable to put on a stunt at a party even when others are doing the same sort of thing.

spq_q_66.Description: Some people find me a bit vague and elusive during a conversation.

spq_q_67.Description: I am poor at returning social courtesies and gestures.

spq_q_68.Description: Do you often pick up hidden threats or putdowns from what people say or do?

spq_q_69.Description: I find it hard to make talk when I meet new people.

spq_q_70.Description: When shopping do you get the feeling that other people are taking notice of you?

spq_q_71.Description: I feel very uncomfortable in social situations involving unfamiliar people.

spq_q_72.Description: I am against giving money to beggars.

spq_q_73.Description: Have you had experiences with astrology, seeing the future, UFOs, ESP or a sixth sense?

spq_q_74.Description: I find it hard to set aside a task that I have undertaken, even for a short time.

spq_q_75.Description: Do everyday things seem unusually large or small?

spq_q_76.Description: Writing letters to friends is more trouble that it is worth.

spq_q_77.Description: I frequently find myself worrying about something.

spq_q_78.Description: I sometimes use words in unusual ways.

spq_q_79.Description: I tend to avoid eye contact when conversing with others.

spq_q_80.Description: My table manners are not quite as good at home as when I am out in company.

spq_q_81.Description: Have you found that it is best not to let other people know too much about you?

spq_q_82.Description: If I could get into a movie without paying and be sure I was not seen I would probably do it.

spq_q_83.Description: There have been times when I have dialed a telephone number only to find that the number was busy.

spq_q_84.Description: When you see people talking to each other, do you often wonder if they are talking about you?

spq_q_85.Description: I like to let people know where I stand on things.

spq_q_86.Description: I would feel very anxious if I had to give a speech in front of a large group of people.

spq_q_87.Description: I get mad easily then get over it soon.

spq_q_88.Description: Have you ever felt that you are communicating with another person telepathically (by mind-reading)?

spq_q_89.Description: I would rather win than lose in a game.

spq_q_90.Description: Does your sense of smell sometimes become unusually strong?

spq_q_91.Description: When in a group of people I have trouble thinking of the right things to talk about.

spq_q_92.Description: I tend to keep in the background on social occasions.

spq_q_93.Description: I have periods in which I feel unusually cheerful without any special reason.

spq_q_94.Description: Do you tend to wander off the topic when having a conversation?

spq_q_95.Description: Once in a while I laugh at a dirty joke.

spq_q_96.Description: I often feel that others have it in for me.

spq_q_97.Description: Do you sometimes feel that other people are watching you?

spq_q_98.Description: I think nearly anyone would tell a lie to keep out of trouble.

spq_q_99.Description: I visited Easter Island last year.

spq_q_100.Description: Do you ever suddenly feel distracted by distant sounds that you are normally not aware of?

spq_q_101.Description: I attach little importance to having close friends.

spq_q_102.Description: I worry over money and business.

spq_q_103.Description: Do you sometimes feel that people are talking about you?

spq_q_104.Description: I like to know some important people because it makes me feel important.

spq_q_105.Description: Are your thoughts sometimes so strong that you can almost hear them?

spq_q_106.Description: Do you often have to keep an eye out to stop people from taking advantage of you?

spq_q_107.Description: At times I am full of energy.

spq_q_108.Description: Do you feel that you are unable to get 'close' to people?

spq_q_109.Description: I am an odd, unusual person.

spq_q_110.Description: I go at least once every two years to visit either northern Scotland or some parts of Scandinavia.

spq_q_112.Description: I do not have an expressive and lively way of speaking.

spq_q_113.Description: I do not like everyone I know.

spq_q_114.Description: I find it hard to communicate clearly what I want to say to people.

spq_q_116.Description: I have sometimes felt that difficulties were piling up so high that I could not overcome them.

spq_q_117.Description: Sometimes I feel sleepy or tired.

spq_q_118.Description: I feel very uneasy talking to people I do not know well.

spq_q_119.Description: I gossip a little at times.

spq_q_120.Description: People occasionally comment that my conversation is confusing.

spq_q_121.Description: On some occasions I have noticed that some other people are better dressed than myself.

spq_q_122.Description: I tend to keep my feelings to myself.

spq_q_123.Description: At periods my mind seems to work more slowly than usual.

spq_q_124.Description: Sometimes in elections I vote for people whom I know very little.

spq_q_125.Description: People sometimes stare at me because of my odd appearance.

spq_q_126.Description: I have often met people who were supposed to be experts who were no better than I.

spq_spq.Description: SPQ All Items Summed Without Validity

spq_validity.Description: Validity score. All items not in spq_spq summed. q16,33,63,99,110 are summed as-is, others are reversed and summed.

spq_cons_affect.Description: Constricted Affect subscale: sum of items q12,26,40,54,67,79,112,122.

spq_def_tscale.Notes: Maps the raw defensiveness score (0–30) to a sex-normed T-score via separate lookup tables for admin_sex 1 and 2; scores ≤6 floor to T=30, and out-of-range/missing input returns −999.

spq_factor_1.Description: Cognitive-Perceptual factor: sum of Ideas of Reference, Magical Thinking, Unusual Perceptions, and Suspiciousness items (q1,4,6,14,15,19,21,28,29,32,34,41,43,46,47,55,57,61,62,68,70,73,75,81,84,88,90,96,97,100,103,105,106).

spq_factor_2.Description: Interpersonal factor: sum of No Close Friends, Constricted Affect, Social Anxiety, and Suspiciousness items (q3,10,12,14,17,24,26,28,31,37,40,41,44,51,54,55,59,64,67,68,71,76,79,81,86,92,96,101,106,108,112,118,122).

spq_factor_cnb_match.Description: Interpersonal factor computed without the Suspiciousness items (for matching to the CNB sample): items q3,10,12,17,24,26,31,37,40,44,51,54,59,64,67,71,76,79,86,92,101,108,112,118,122.

spq_factor_3.Description: Disorganized factor: sum of Odd Behavior and Odd Speech items (q8,11,22,25,35,38,49,52,66,78,94,109,114,115,120,125).

spq_infrequency.Description: Infrequency (Jackson) validity scale: reverse-scored q7,83,117,121 plus q33,63,99,110. High scores suggest careless/invalid responding.

spq_lie.Description: Lie scale (raw): count of unlikely responses across validity items q2,13,18,23,42,48,58,80,82,89,95,104,113,119,124 (each reverse-scored: False=1).

spq_lie_tscale.Description: Lie scale T-score, normed by sex
spq_lie_tscale.Notes: maps the raw lie score (0–15) to a sex-normed T-score via separate lookup tables for admin_sex 1 and 2; out-of-range/missing input returns −999.

spq_magical.Description: Magical Thinking subscale: sum of True responses to items q4,19,32,46,61,73,88.

spq_no_friends.Description: No Close Friends subscale: sum of True responses to items q10,24,37,51,64,76,92,101,108.

spq_odd_behav.Description: Odd or Eccentric Behavior subscale: sum of True responses to items q8,22,35,49,109,115,125.

spq_odd_speech.Description: Odd Speech subscale: sum of True responses to items q11,25,38,52,66,78,94,114,120.

spq_ideas_ref.Description: Ideas of Reference subscale: sum of True responses to items q1,15,29,43,57,70,84,97,103.

spq_social_anx.Description: Social Anxiety subscale: sum of True responses to items q3,17,31,44,59,71,86,118.

spq_suspicious.Description: Suspiciousness subscale: sum of True responses to items q14,28,41,55,68,81,96,106.

spq_percep.Description: Unusual Perceptions subscale: sum of True responses to items q6,21,34,47,62,75,90,100,105.
